# Fitzgerald's Irish Tavern

> Authentic Irish tavern in downtown New Port Richey, FL, serving craft pints, Irish-inspired pub fare, and live music since 2004. 26 HDTVs for every game day.

## Key Info
- Address: 5811 Nebraska Ave, New Port Richey, FL 34652
- Phone: (727) 816-9092
- Hours: Open daily; open until 2AM Thursday–Saturday
- Cuisine: Irish, Pub Food, American
- Price range: $$
- Founded: 2004
- Reservations: Not accepted (walk-in)

## Pages
- [Home](https://fitzgeraldstavern.com/): Overview, hours, location, reviews
- [Menu](https://fitzgeraldstavern.com/menu.html): Full food & drink menu
- [Events](https://fitzgeraldstavern.com/events.html): Live music and event calendar

## Highlights
- Live music weekly
- 26 HDTVs — every game, every sport
- Cold pints on tap
- One of the longest-running businesses in downtown New Port Richey
